raw: Huge amount of rubbish cleaned up. And everyone left smiling.

title: Spotlighting
raw: Great to partner with JCU Zoology!!

title: Long Beach Clean Up
raw: Not much rubbish and the weather was cold and harsh
Cafe near us treated us to half price hot drinks

title: Warriparinga Wetland Spotlighting
raw: One attendee at the start of event was smoking, we asked that the person not smoke at the event and they were very understanding. Will bring red selefane next time for torches to prevent animals from being stunned by the bright lights.
Biggest turn out yet! Saw some possums, tawny frogmouths, insects and more.
